name: Ruby
description: The king of gemstones, Ruby symbolizes passion, protection, and prosperity. Its deep red hue has captivated humanity for centuries.

properties.healing: Boosts energy, improves circulation, detoxifies blood
properties.spiritual: Enhances courage, passion, and leadership qualities

name: Blue Sapphire
description: A powerful stone of wisdom and royalty, Blue Sapphire brings mental clarity, spiritual insight, and protection from negative energies.

properties.healing: Calms the mind, reduces inflammation, aids throat issues
properties.spiritual: Enhances intuition, wisdom, and spiritual awareness

name: Emerald
description: The stone of successful love, Emerald brings loyalty, unity, and unconditional love. It enhances memory and mental clarity.

properties.healing: Improves eyesight, boosts immunity, aids recovery

name: Yellow Sapphire
description: A stone of wisdom and prosperity, Yellow Sapphire attracts wealth, good fortune, and academic success.

properties.healing: Aids digestion, boosts metabolism, strengthens liver
properties.spiritual: Enhances wisdom, optimism, and spiritual growth

name: Pearl
description: Symbol of purity and emotional balance, Pearl calms the mind, nurtures love, and brings peace to the wearer.

properties.healing: Balances hormones, aids skin health, calms nerves
properties.spiritual: Enhances feminine energy and emotional healing

name: Red Coral
description: A powerful protective stone, Red Coral boosts courage, vitality, and physical strength. It guards against negativity.

properties.healing: Strengthens bones, purifies blood, boosts immunity

name: Hessonite Garnet
description: Known as Gomed, this stone neutralizes the malefic effects of Rahu, bringing clarity and removing confusion.

properties.healing: Aids allergies, digestive issues, and skin problems
properties.spiritual: Clears confusion, enhances focus and meditation
properties.emotional: Reduces anxiety, fear of the unknown

name: Cat's Eye
description: A mysterious stone associated with Ketu, Cat's Eye provides protection, intuition, and liberation from material bonds.

properties.healing: Aids recovery from chronic diseases, strengthens nerves

name: Diamond
description: The ultimate symbol of love and luxury, Diamond enhances creativity, brings clarity of mind, and attracts abundance.

properties.healing: Purifies body systems, enhances brain function
properties.spiritual: Amplifies energy of other stones, brings inner vision

name: Amethyst
description: The stone of tranquility, Amethyst purifies the mind, reduces stress, and enhances spiritual awareness.

properties.healing: Relieves headaches, reduces insomnia, detoxifies

name: Citrine
description: Known as the merchant's stone, Citrine attracts prosperity, success, and abundance. It radiates positive energy.

properties.healing: Boosts metabolism, improves digestion, energizes

name: Rose Quartz
description: The universal stone of love, Rose Quartz opens the heart to compassion, self-love, and deep inner healing.

properties.healing: Improves circulation, aids fertility, reduces wrinkles
properties.spiritual: Opens heart chakra, enhances unconditional love
properties.emotional: Heals heartbreak, promotes forgiveness and trust

name: Topaz
description: A stone of strength and intelligence, Topaz sharpens the mind, attracts success, and promotes emotional stability.

properties.healing: Aids digestion, stimulates metabolism, improves vision

name: Aquamarine
description: The sailor's gem, Aquamarine evokes the purity of crystal blue waters. It promotes courage, clarity, and communication.

properties.healing: Soothes sore throats, reduces allergies, calms nerves
properties.emotional: Reduces fear, promotes tolerance and peace

name: Garnet
description: A revitalizing stone, Garnet inspires love, devotion, and energizes the spirit. It balances energy and brings serenity.

properties.healing: Boosts metabolism, regenerates cells, purifies blood
properties.spiritual: Grounds energy, enhances commitment and devotion

name: Opal
description: The queen of gems, Opal is a stone of inspiration, imagination, and creativity. Its play of colors symbolizes cosmic fire.

properties.healing: Strengthens memory, purifies blood, regulates insulin
properties.emotional: Promotes creativity, spontaneity, and emotional freedom

name: Turquoise
description: An ancient talisman of protection, Turquoise is a purification stone that dispels negative energy and promotes wisdom.

properties.healing: Anti-inflammatory, aids respiratory system, detoxifies

name: Lapis Lazuli
description: The stone of truth and enlightenment, Lapis Lazuli stimulates objectivity, clarity, and encourages creativity.

properties.healing: Lowers blood pressure, boosts immunity, aids throat
properties.spiritual: Opens third eye, enhances dream work and intuition

name: Moonstone
description: The traveler's stone, Moonstone harnesses the energy of the moon. It enhances intuition, promotes inspiration, and brings good fortune.

properties.healing: Balances hormones, aids fertility, soothes digestion

name: Peridot
description: The gem of the sun, Peridot radiates warmth and well-being. It attracts love, calms anger, and brings prosperity.

properties.healing: Strengthens immune system, aids digestion, heals ulcers

name: Tanzanite
description: A rare and extraordinary gem found only in Tanzania, Tanzanite facilitates higher consciousness and stimulates perception.

properties.healing: Aids cell regeneration, strengthens immune system

name: Tiger's Eye
description: A stone of protection and power, Tiger's Eye combines the energy of the sun and earth. It promotes integrity and willpower.

properties.healing: Balances endocrine system, reduces pain, heals bones

name: Jade
description: The dream stone, Jade is a symbol of serenity, purity, and wisdom. It attracts good luck and lasting friendship.

properties.healing: Aids kidneys, removes toxins, enhances immune system
properties.emotional: Calms the mind, releases negative thoughts

name: Alexandrite
description: The chameleon gem, Alexandrite changes color from green in daylight to red in lamplight. It symbolizes luck and good fortune.

properties.healing: Aids nervous system, regenerates cells, reduces inflammation
properties.spiritual: Enhances intuition, bridges physical and spiritual
properties.emotional: Promotes joy, purpose, and emotional maturity

name: Onyx
description: A powerful protection stone, Onyx absorbs negative energy and promotes strength, stamina, and self-control.

properties.healing: Strengthens bones, teeth, and immune system
properties.spiritual: Grounds energy, enhances endurance and persistence
